message.smokingwarningmod.need_lighter: You need a lighter to smoke.
message.smokingwarningmod.smoking_starte: Sweetness cannot hide the smoke's damage.
Ender smoke starts to twist space.
Redstone smoke makes your heartbeat quicken.
Heavy smoke presses against your body.
You click Rick V to life.
message.smokingwarningmod.finish.regular: A brief rush rises up, but your body does not feel light.
message.smokingwarningmod.finish.menthol: Cold smoke leaves you briefly clear-headed.
message.smokingwarningmod.finish.honey: The sweetness brings a short moment of comfort.
message.smokingwarningmod.finish.phantom: Strange smoke makes your body feel weightless.
message.smokingwarningmod.finish.ender: Ender smoke briefly twists the space around you.
message.smokingwarningmod.finish.glow: Glowing smoke lights up the area around you.
message.smokingwarningmod.finish.redston: Redstone smoke makes your heartbeat accelerate.
message.smokingwarningmod.finish.netheri: Heavy smoke makes you unusually tough for a short time.
message.smokingwarningmod.rick_v.finish: You feel the ridiculous power of Rick V.
message.smokingwarningmod.rick_v.chat: Do you want to smoke an e-cigarette?
message.smokingwarningmod.rick_v.nearby: The air is filled with a strangely absurd vapor.
message.smokingwarningmod.huazi.finish: You lit a cigarette that feels unusually fancy.
message.smokingwarningmod.huazi.nearby: A strangely fancy smell drifts through the air.
message.smokingwarningmod.lotus.finish: A faint lotus-like smoke spreads around you.
message.smokingwarningmod.lotus.nearby: A soft lotus-like smell drifts through the air.
message.smokingwarningmod.blaze_burn: Scorching smoke bites at your lungs.
message.smokingwarningmod.withdrawal_dis: You feel irritable and unwell from withdrawal.
message.smokingwarningmod.secondhand_smo: People nearby are breathing your smoke.
message.smokingwarningmod.addiction.ligh: You start craving cigarettes often. Your body is showing mild dependence.
message.smokingwarningmod.addiction.medi: Your addiction is getting worse. Coughing and chest tightness are becoming obvious.
message.smokingwarningmod.addiction.heav: Long-term smoking has seriously damaged your body.
message.smokingwarningmod.penalty.light: You start coughing, but you have not realized the problem is getting worse.
message.smokingwarningmod.penalty.medium: Your lungs begin to protest. Your stamina and recovery are declining.
message.smokingwarningmod.penalty.heavy: Long-term smoking has severely damaged your lungs. Your body can no longer work normally.
message.smokingwarningmod.cough_interrup: A violent cough interrupts your movement.
message.smokingwarningmod.chest_tightnes: Your chest tightens and breathing becomes difficult.
message.smokingwarningmod.lung_cancer_sm: Your lungs are already severely damaged. Continuing to smoke is hurting your life.
A violent cough makes your chest ache sharply.
message.smokingwarningmod.lung_cancer_fi: This cigarette makes your physical condition even worse.
message.smokingwarningmod.reward_decay.l: Your body is becoming dependent, and the rush from cigarettes is fading.
message.smokingwarningmod.reward_decay.m: Addiction weakens the cigarette's short-lived effects.
message.smokingwarningmod.reward_decay.h: Your body is severely damaged. Cigarettes can barely help you now.
message.smokingwarningmod.reward_conflic: The negative effects of addiction cancelled this short-lived benefit.
message.smokingwarningmod.drying_rack_no: The tobacco leaf is not dry yet.
message.smokingwarningmod.drying_rack_co: You collected the dried tobacco leaves.
message.smokingwarningmod.tobacco_grinde: You ground the dried tobacco leaf into shreds.

message.smokingwarningmod.treatment.alre: You have already been diagnosed. Continue your treatment.
message.smokingwarningmod.treatment.not_: You need to use a Lung Scanner to diagnose lung cancer first.
message.smokingwarningmod.treatment.disa: Lung cancer treatment system is disabled.
message.smokingwarningmod.treatment.alre: Your condition is already in remission. No further treatment needed.
message.smokingwarningmod.treatment.cool: Your body cannot handle another treatment yet.
message.smokingwarningmod.treatment.need: Insufficient treatment progress. Complete the earlier treatment steps first.
message.smokingwarningmod.treatment.chem: Chemotherapy begins to control the disease, but you feel extremely weak.
message.smokingwarningmod.treatment.radi: Radiotherapy is suppressing the disease, but you feel very fatigued.
message.smokingwarningmod.treatment.targ: Targeted therapy is taking effect. The condition is slowly improving.
message.smokingwarningmod.treatment.reha: You begin the rehabilitation plan. You must stay smoke-free for three full days.
message.smokingwarningmod.treatment.alre: You are already in rehabilitation. Keep staying smoke-free.
message.smokingwarningmod.treatment.reha: Long-term treatment and quitting smoking have finally put your condition into remission.
You interrupted your rehabilitation plan. Your condition has worsened again.
message.smokingwarningmod.treatment.smok: Smoking during treatment has worsened your condition.

message.smokingwarningmod.lung_cancer.gu: You have reached the lung cancer stage. You can buy the Lung Cancer Treatment Guide from a master Tobacco Villager.
message.smokingwarningmod.village.no_smo: This is a village no-smoking zone! The iron golems are angered by your smoking.
guide.smokingwarningmod.treatment.page.1:
Lung Cancer Treatment Guide

Long-term smoking has severely damaged your lungs.
If you reach the lung cancer stage, continuing to smoke will directly damage your health.
A single bottle of medicine cannot cure you. You must quit smoking and complete long-term treatment.
guide.smokingwarningmod.treatment.page.2:
Step 1: Diagnosis

Use the Lung Scanner.
Only after reaching heavy addiction or the lung cancer stage will the scanner confirm severe lung damage.
After diagnosis, you can begin the treatment process.
guide.smokingwarningmod.treatment.page.3:
Step 2: Control the Disease

Use Chemotherapy Medicine to control the disease.
Chemotherapy increases treatment progress, but causes weakness, nausea, and slowness.
Do not smoke during treatment, or your treatment progress will decrease.
guide.smokingwarningmod.treatment.page.4:
Step 3: Radiotherapy

When treatment progress reaches the required level, use the Radiotherapy Core.
Radiotherapy further suppresses the disease, but makes your body very fatigued.
guide.smokingwarningmod.treatment.page.5:
Step 4: Targeted Therapy

Use Targeted Therapy Medicine.
Targeted therapy greatly increases treatment progress with milder side effects, but the materials are more expensive.
guide.smokingwarningmod.treatment.page.6:
Step 5: Rehabilitation Plan

When treatment progress is high enough, use the Rehabilitation Plan.
Then you must stay smoke-free for 3 full Minecraft days.
If you smoke during this time, the rehab plan will fail and your condition will worsen again.
guide.smokingwarningmod.treatment.page.7:
Treatment Results

After successful treatment, lung cancer enters remission.
But your smoking record is not completely erased. You will still have medium addiction.
If you continue smoking, you can still re-enter heavy addiction and lung cancer.
guide.smokingwarningmod.treatment.page.8:
Village No-Smoking Reminder

Villages are no-smoking zones.
Smoking in dense village areas will anger the iron golems.
Iron golems will attack smoking players.
Do not smoke in villages.
message.smokingwarningmod.village.no_smo: You have entered a village no-smoking zone. Please do not smoke here.
command.smokingwarningmod.tobacco.not_fo: No tobacco villager or workbench found nearby
